entity_types.name: AnimalSpecies
entity_types.description: A classification of animals, often including common names and scientific binomials.

entity_types.name: TaxonomicRank
entity_types.description: A level in the hierarchical classification of organisms.

entity_types.name: GeographicRegion
entity_types.description: A defined area of land or water, often with shared characteristics.

entity_types.name: Organization
entity_types.description: A structured group of people with a particular purpose.
examples: International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN)
IUCN/Species Survival Commission's Canid Specialist Group

entity_types.name: Disease
entity_types.description: A disorder of structure or function in an animal, especially one that produces specific symptoms or that affects a specific location and is not simply a direct result of physical injury.

entity_types.name: Parasite
entity_types.description: An organism that lives in or on an organism of another species (its host) and benefits by deriving nutrients at the other's expense.

entity_types.name: ConservationStatus
entity_types.description: An indicator of the likelihood of a species continuing to survive.

entity_types.name: CulturalConcept
entity_types.description: An idea or belief that is shared by a group of people.

entity_types.name: CulturalWork
entity_types.description: A product of creative work, such as a book, film, or sculpture.

relation_groups.name: Taxonomic Classification
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the hierarchical classification of animal species.

relations.name: is_a_member_of
relations.detail: Indicates that an animal species belongs to a particular taxonomic rank.

relations.name: includes
relations.detail: Indicates that a taxonomic rank encompasses certain animal species.

relations.name: has_subspecies
relations.detail: Indicates that an animal species has a recognized subspecies.

relation_groups.name: Geographic Distribution
relation_groups.description: Relations describing where animal species are found or where events related to them occur.

relations.name: native_to
relations.detail: Indicates the native habitat of an animal species.

relations.name: occurs_in
relations.detail: Indicates a region where an animal species is found.

relations.name: found_in
relations.detail: Indicates a region where an animal species is present.

relation_groups.name: Biological Interactions
relation_groups.description: Relations describing how animal species interact with each other or with diseases/parasites.

relations.name: preys_on
relations.detail: Indicates that one animal species hunts and kills another for food.

relations.name: infects
relations.detail: Indicates that a disease can infect an animal species.

relations.name: infested_with
relations.detail: Indicates that an animal species is commonly infested by a parasite.

relations.name: can_produce_hybrids_with
relations.detail: Indicates that two animal species can interbreed to produce fertile hybrids.

relation_groups.name: Conservation and Policy
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the conservation status of species and the organizations involved.

relations.name: assessed_by
relations.detail: Indicates the organization that assessed the conservation status of a species.

relations.name: has_status
relations.detail: Indicates the conservation status assigned to an animal species.

relations.name: listed_under
relations.detail: Indicates the legal or international listing of a species for conservation.

examples.head: wolf
examples.tail: International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN)

relation_groups.name: Cultural Representation
relation_groups.description: Relations describing how animal species are represented in culture, folklore, and literature.

relations.name: associated_with
relations.detail: Indicates a cultural concept or figure associated with an animal species.

relations.name: features_in
relations.detail: Indicates a cultural work or story in which an animal species is a character.

relation_groups.name: Creation and Authorship
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the creation of cultural works and their creators.

relations.name: created_by
relations.detail: Indicates the organization responsible for creating a cultural work.

relations.name: authored_by
relations.detail: Indicates the author of a cultural work.

relation_groups.name: Cultural Impact
relation_groups.description: Relations describing the impact or influence of cultural works or concepts.

relations.name: influenced_by
relations.detail: Indicates that a cultural concept was influenced by a cultural work.
